text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Good morning, Trainer! Now that the break's
over, let's get to training!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
And wouldn't you know, I've prepared the perfect
divination technique for this very purpose! Here
goes...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
All righty! Look at the angle of my arms! This is
what you've gotta do to separate wooden
chopsticks perfectly!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Training is gonna go pretty well today, I'm sure of
it!
